requirement_topic.en: North American Charging Connector — SAE J1772 and CCS1

summary.en: Canada-market AC EV charging equipment is expected to interoperate with North American SAE J1772 AC connectors, and DC fast charging equipment commonly uses the CCS Combo 1 interface for Combined Charging System compatibility. These connector standards are voluntary technical specifications and market-interoperability expectations; the mandatory legal obligations arise through electrical approval, installation acceptance, procurement rules, incentive-program rules, utility requirements, or operator requirements where applicable.
summary.zh: 加拿大市场交流电动汽车充电设备通常预期与北美SAE J1772交流接口互操作，直流快充设备通常使用CCS Combo 1接口以实现组合充电系统兼容。这些接口标准是自愿技术规范和市场互操作预期；强制性法律义务在适用时来自电气批准、安装验收、采购规则、补贴项目规则、公用事业要求或运营商要求。
summary.zht: 加拿大市場交流電動汽車充電設備通常預期與北美SAE J1772交流接口互操作，直流快充設備通常使用CCS Combo 1接口以實現組合充電系統相容。這些接口標準是自願技術規範和市場互操作預期；強制性法律義務在適用時來自電氣批准、安裝驗收、採購規則、補貼項目規則、公用事業要求或運營商要求。

standards_or_laws: SAE J1772 — Electric Vehicle and Plug in Hybrid Electric Vehicle Conductive Charge Coupler
IEC 62196-3 / SAE CCS Combo 1 technical ecosystem
Provincial electrical approval and inspection requirements for installed equipment

summary.en: China uses GB/T 20234.2 for AC conductive charging connectors and GB/T 20234.3 for DC connectors, with GB/T 27930 communication for many DC charging systems. GB/T 20234 connectors are physically and electrically different from SAE J1772 and CCS1 and should not be described as Canada-ready connector compliance.
summary.zh: 中国交流传导充电接口采用GB/T 20234.2，直流接口采用GB/T 20234.3，许多直流充电系统采用GB/T 27930通信。GB/T 20234接口在物理和电气上均不同于SAE J1772和CCS1，不能被描述为已满足加拿大接口合规。
summary.zht: 中國交流傳導充電接口採用GB/T 20234.2，直流接口採用GB/T 20234.3，許多直流充電系統採用GB/T 27930通訊。GB/T 20234接口在物理和電氣上均不同於SAE J1772和CCS1，不能被描述為已滿足加拿大接口合規。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930 — Communication protocol between off-board conductive charger and battery management system

gap.en: A charger designed only around GB/T 20234 is not connector-compatible with Canada-market vehicles and charging infrastructure. The gap is hardware and protocol-level: inlet geometry, pin assignments, locking, proximity/control pilot behavior, DC communication path, labels, and cable assemblies may require redesign and Canadian safety re-evaluation. Adapters should not be treated as a substitute for a certified Canada-market connector design.
gap.zh: 仅按GB/T 20234设计的充电设备与加拿大市场车辆和充电基础设施接口不兼容。差距属于硬件和协议层面：接口几何形状、针脚定义、锁止、接近/控制引导行为、直流通信路径、标签和电缆组件可能均需重新设计并接受加拿大安全复评。不应将转接器视为已认证加拿大市场接口设计的替代品。
gap.zht: 僅按GB/T 20234設計的充電設備與加拿大市場車輛和充電基礎設施接口不相容。差距屬於硬件和協議層面：接口幾何形狀、針腳定義、鎖止、接近/控制導引行為、直流通訊路徑、標籤和電纜組件可能均需重新設計並接受加拿大安全複評。不應將轉接器視為已認證加拿大市場接口設計的替代品。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: use approved electrical equipment and meet installation or procurement requirements where applicable. SAE J1772 and CCS1 are voluntary technical connector specifications and market-interoperability routes; they are not mandatory legal obligations by themselves.
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 connector conformity applies to China domestic products and is not a Canada-market connector substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not use GB/T 20234 as the Canada connector basis. Canada-market EVSE should be engineered and evaluated around SAE J1772 for AC and CCS1 for DC fast charging where those interfaces are required by the intended deployment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不得以GB/T 20234作为加拿大接口基础。拟进入加拿大市场的充电设备，在目标部署要求这些接口时，应围绕SAE J1772交流接口和CCS1直流快充接口进行工程设计和评估。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不得以GB/T 20234作為加拿大接口基礎。擬進入加拿大市場的充電設備，在目標部署要求這些接口時，應圍繞SAE J1772交流接口和CCS1直流快充接口進行工程設計和評估。
